parsed_output.justification: Justin explicitly claims to have been a werewolf at the start of the game ('I'm going to go out on a leg and I'm going to say that I was a werewolf when we started'). While Caitlynn also briefly claims to be the werewolf, Justin actively attempts to steer suspicion away from her by labeling her as the Tanner, which is a common tactic for a werewolf to protect others or confuse the group. Mitchell also expresses his intention to vote for Justin. Given Justin's direct admission of the role, he is the most likely candidate for elimination to ensure a Team Village win.
